commit_scope: Compile focused thesis if_fail and while_success source forms into BMA-native execution with forward/backward proof.

local_validation.notes: The new source proof returns 262143 across Go/Rust/TypeScript kernels. The existing thesis exit proof remains 1073741840. The kernel-native audit reports no new unexpected BML/BMF host-native semantics.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A .bml source file containing focused thesis if_fail and while_success forms now parses through the BML/BMF source path, lowers into BMA ops, executes forward, and replays backward to the empty VM state.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-control-primitives-source-proof.fk

phase_gate.reason: This closes focused source-to-native BMA support for if_fail fallback and guarded while_success fail-loop forms. Full BML thesis parity remains open: arbitrary control-flow/expression lowering and whole companion-corpus native execution are still required.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/tests/fixtures/bml-thesis-control-primitives.bml is the source fixture for the proof.
form/form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-control-primitives-source-proof.fk proves parse rules, BMA op counts, forward return values, and backward restoration.
docs/system_audit/bml_thesis_feature_audit_20260601.md records the newly proven focused forms and keeps remaining full-parity gaps explicit.
